-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://docs.mcp.deepsense.ai/guides/clinical_trials.html)[Privacy Policy](https://deepsense.ai/privacy-policy/)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#305d53401e434540405f4244705455554043555e43551e5159)
    

The Clinical Trials connector gives Claude access to ClinicalTrials.gov, the NIH/NLM registry of FDA-regulated clinical studies conducted worldwide. Search for trials by condition, eligibility criteria, sponsor, or investigator. Analyze endpoints, find recruiting studies, and identify experienced research sites for clinical development planning.

You can use the Clinical Trials connector to:

**Match a Patient to Trials:** "I have a 62-year-old female patient with metastatic breast cancer in New York. Are there any recruiting trials she might qualify for?"

**Gather Competitive Intelligence:** "What immunotherapy trials is Bristol Myers Squibb currently running?"

**Support Site Selection:** "I'm planning a diabetes trial. Who are the most experienced investigators in Los Angeles?"

**Analyze Trial Endpoints:** "What primary endpoints are being used in current Phase 3 Alzheimer's trials?"
